vibe: Authoritative, clear, function-first, data-dense without cognitive overload

components.cards: Flat background, 1px solid border-slate-200, no shadow. Content tightly padded (p-5).
components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. Primary CTA uses deep blue (#002FA7). High contrast text. No gradients.
components.tables: Dense rows. IBM Plex Sans for tabular numbers (tabular-nums). Subtle bg-slate-50 hover state for rows. Sticky header with clear sorting icons.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. No gradients in bars/lines - solid colors only. Minimal grid lines (dashed, low opacity).
components.sidebar: Fixed left, solid white background, 1px solid right border (border-slate-200). Menu items have slight bg tint on hover.
components.inputs: 1px solid border, rounded-sm, pure white background. Focus ring must be crisp: focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary/20.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA adherence. Text must have >4.5:1 ratio against background.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install @phosphor-icons/react and use it for all icons (Dashboard, Search, Compare, ROI, Export, Settings).
Install and use 'Manrope' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body and data tabular content.
Use Shadcn UI primitives but override their default border-radius from 'rounded-md' to 'rounded-sm' for a sharper, more technical Swiss look.
Implement the Dashboard KPIs following a 'Control Room' grid layout: large typography for metrics, small high-contrast directional indicators (e.g., red/green carets).
Ensure 'AI Insights' cards have a distinctive but subtle background tint (bg-[#F0F4FF]) to differentiate them from raw data cards. Use a spark icon.
For the Area Comparison feature, utilize a responsive grid that allows side-by-side comparison (up to 5 columns), with horizontal scroll on small viewports.
Language Switcher (ID/EN) should be accessible from the sidebar footer or top header.
All charts (Histogram, Bar, Pie) must strictly avoid default generic colors; map them to the palette defined in `colors.charts`.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all buttons, inputs, navigation links, and chart containers for end-to-end testing.
For Auth pages (Login/Register), utilize a split screen layout. Left side: Form. Right side: The `auth_background` image with a black/40 overlay.
